analysis: That opening night on 1 July was rough — only 6h 9m with nearly two hours just lying there awake — but you turned it around fast, and nights two and three were genuinely good, peaking at almost 8 hours with that gorgeous 2h 34m REM on night three which is honestly enviable. The middle of the stretch held solid in the 7h 15–35m range, which tells me whatever you're stacking — the magnesium, the cold blast, the yin yoga — is doing something real. The one thing worth noticing is that deep sleep has been a little shy all week, mostly sitting in the 28–53 minute window, and that first night's awake time was a lot, but you've clearly got the tools working because you didn't let it become a pattern.
